6672.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension enabling NFTs to be redeemed multiple times for physical or digital items.
6672.notes: Adds redemption tracking and status management on-chain, with optional metadata schema extension.

6682.one_line_summary: Extends ERC-3156 flashloans to support NFT flashloans with configurable fee tokens.
6682.notes: Primary purpose is enabling NFT flashloans; extends existing flashloan standard rather than creating token standard.

6734.one_line_summary: JSON schema for canonical token lists across L1, L2, and sidechains with DIDs and URI identifiers.
6734.notes: Uses JSON-LD and W3C standards for interoperability; defines tokens across multi-chain systems.

6735.one_line_summary: Deterministic EVM address aliasing for identifying same account across L1, L2, and sidechains.
6735.notes: Enables cross-chain address translation using offset-based alias scheme; based on existing L2 patterns.

6785.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension providing utility description and historical access information for NFTs.
6785.notes: Adds utility metadata tracking with history; aims to prevent scams by capturing utility terms on-chain.

6786.one_line_summary: Registry for paying and tracking royalties owed to NFT creators independent of marketplace.
6786.notes: Extends ERC-2981 with cumulative payment tracking; enables anyone to pay royalties retroactively.

6787.one_line_summary: Order book DEX interface with two-phase withdrawal mechanism protecting users and exchange assets.
6787.notes: Addresses security concerns specific to order book DEXs with forced withdrawal validation periods.

6806.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension tracking duration and holder of NFT ownership for reward or access logic.
6806.notes: Simple interface returning current holder and holding duration in seconds; supports whitelisting certain addresses.

6808.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension with optional security via two key wallets controlling transfers and approvals.
6808.notes: Adds binding, approval, and transfer restrictions; includes safeFallback and resetBindings for recovery; fully backward compatible.

6809.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension with optional security via two key wallets controlling token transfers and approvals.
6809.notes: Parallel to ERC-6808 for NFTs; adds binding, transfer, approval conditions; includes recovery mechanisms.

6821.one_line_summary: Maps ENS names to contract addresses in Web3 URLs via contentcontract text record and chain-specific addressing.
6821.notes: Extension to ERC-4804 enabling human-readable Web3 URL contracts via ENS; supports ERC-3770 chain-specific addresses.

6823.one_line_summary: Storage slot retrieval function for ERC-20/721/1155 mapping enabling accurate off-chain transaction simulation.
6823.notes: Adds getTokenLocationRoot() function to retrieve mapping storage slot; reduces simulation reliance on events.

6860.one_line_summary: Translates HTTP-style Web3 URLs to EVM call messages supporting manual and auto resolve modes.
6860.notes: Update to ERC-4804 with clarifications and format specifications; supports ENS names and cross-chain calls.

6864.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension enabling upgrade/downgrade of tokens while preserving balances across implementations.
6864.notes: Allows non-proxy upgrade pattern on existing ERC-20 contracts; includes optional see-through functions for combined balances.

6865.one_line_summary: On-chain EIP-712 visualization function returning structured asset impact data to prevent signing scams.
6865.notes: Shifts EIP-712 visualization responsibility from wallets to protocols; returns assetsIn, assetsOut, and liveness information.
